subject: red pandas
one_liner: The connected workspace for wikis, bamboo logistics, and sleep, built for a solitary mammal who never asked for project management.
brand_voice_notes: Deadpan faux-corporate productivity-SaaS pitch. Straight-faced about selling collaboration software to a famously solitary, territorial, mostly-asleep animal. Never winks. Treats biological facts (solitary, crepuscular, eats bamboo for hours, scent-marks territory, sleeps eleven-plus hours) as product requirements and feature constraints. Confident pricing, specific fake users.

hero.h1: Get your whole den organized. It is just you. It was always just you.
hero.sub: Canopy is the connected workspace for wikis, bamboo logistics, and sleep. Built for a solitary, territorial, mostly-nocturnal mammal who did not request project management and will not be using the comment feature.

features.title: Real-time collaboration
features.blurb: Co-edit documents live with your team of zero. Every keystroke syncs instantly to the other red pandas, of which there are none, because you have scent-marked this entire branch and they understood the message.

features.title: Bamboo Backlog
features.blurb: Track every shoot you intend to eat across a drag-and-drop board: To Forage, Currently Chewing, Digested. Burndown charts ship by default. You will not look at them. You will be chewing.

features.title: A calendar that respects your hours
features.blurb: Canopy syncs across both windows you are awake for, dawn and dusk, and blocks the other eleven hours as Focus Time. The focus is sleeping. We do not interrupt Focus Time.

pricing_tiers.name: Solitary
pricing_tiers.tagline: For one red panda. The natural and permanent state of things.

pricing_tiers.name: Territory
pricing_tiers.tagline: For the panda who has claimed more than one tree.

pricing_tiers.name: Breeding Program
pricing_tiers.tagline: Billed to the conservation nonprofit, not the panda.

testimonials.quote: I have never opened the second page. I do not know what is on it. The first page has my bamboo. That is the whole document.
testimonials.name: Mochi
testimonials.title: Solo IC, Bamboo Procurement, Sichuan Province

testimonials.quote: They added me to a shared doc once. I left the tree. I have not returned to that tree.
testimonials.name: Pabu
testimonials.title: Founding Red Panda, Himalayan Branch (Remote)

testimonials.quote: The Nap Log says I slept fourteen hours. I have no follow-up questions and no action items.
testimonials.name: Dorje
testimonials.title: Head of Rest, Eastern Canopy Division

demo_screen_concept: A Notion-style single-panda workspace. Left rail of collapsible pages (Den Wiki, Bamboo Backlog, Nap Log, Territory Disputes). The main pane defaults to a drag-and-drop Bamboo Backlog kanban: each card is one bamboo shoot tagged with a ripeness score (1 to 10) and a 'chewed-through %' progress bar, draggable across To Forage / Currently Chewing / Digested columns with a live count per column. A view switcher flips the main pane to the Nap Log: a sortable table of naps with duration, branch location, and a 'disturbed by zookeeper?' checkbox, plus an add-row button. Everything is mock client-side data.

design_direction.style: claymorphism — puffy clay productivity den. Fully rounded geometry, soft matte clay surfaces, dual soft shadows (a light top-left highlight and a deeper bottom-right shadow that read as inflated 3D), inset wells for inputs and the kanban columns, one cool periwinkle accent pushing against the russet primary so it never reads as a kids' app
design_direction.archetype: SaaS productivity landing (hero with single primary CTA, three features, three testimonials, three pricing tiers, footer)
design_direction.motion_vocab: buttons press in (scale 0.97 plus a deeper inset shadow) like soft clay; cards settle with a short ease-out; kanban cards lift on grab with an enlarged shadow
design_direction.hero_composition_notes: Centered hero on warm clay bg. Chunky rounded Baloo 2 headline, a single inflated periwinkle primary button next to a quiet ghost 'open the demo' link. A puffy clay 'browser card' mockup of the workspace floats below the fold-line as social proof. Russet used for the wordmark and accents, periwinkle reserved for the one primary action per section.
